description_long: This is a sleek black bucket hat with a wide, downward-sloping brim and a rounded, flat-topped crown. The hat features visible stitching along the brim and crown, adding subtle texture and structure to its otherwise minimalist design. The material appears to be a smooth, slightly glossy synthetic fabric, likely polyester or nylon, which gives it a modern, urban look. There are no visible decorative elements, logos, or embellishments, emphasizing its understated style. The hat is designed to fit snugly on the head, providing shade and protection from the sun. Its simple, utilitarian form makes it suitable for a variety of urban environments and casual streetwear.
description: A minimalist black bucket hat with a wide, stitched brim and a smooth, flat-topped crown, made from a slightly glossy synthetic fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, downward-sloping brim and the rounded, flat-topped crown with visible stitching.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous, even brim and the smooth, unadorned surface of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform curvature of the brim and the seamless back of the crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the hat's symmetrical shape and clean lines.
